rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into implementation scope only when binding implementation-level signal routing, after relevant subcomponents and connections.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL structure by confining AGREE annexes to scopes where referenced ports and connections are visibly defined.
Only reference ports and connections that are explicitly declared in the AADL model’s component implementation layer.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annexes must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` and placed within valid AADL component implementations for implementation-level bindings.
anti_patterns: Do not reference component type ports or AADL properties as if they are directly accessible in implementation-level AGREE annexes.
irrelevant_topics: AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables
